glosses.vi: nhà để xe; gara ô tô

sentences.target: Je gare le vélo dans le garage.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ɡaʁ lə ve.lo dɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: Je gare le vélo dans le garage.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ɡaʁ lə ve.lo dɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/
translations.en: I park the bike in the garage.
translations.es: Aparco la bicicleta en el garaje.
translations.de: Ich stelle das Fahrrad in die Garage.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把自行车停在车库里。
translations.yue: 我把單車泊喺車房入面。
translations.vi: Tôi cất xe đạp vào gara.
translations.nl: Ik zet de fiets in de garage.
translations.hi: मैं साइकिल को गैरेज में रखता हूँ।
translations.ja: 自転車をガレージに停める。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive action of parking.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'vélo'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'gare'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'garage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Tu passes au garage après le travail.
sentences.reading: /ty pas o ɡaʁaʒ a.pʁɛ lə tʁa.vaj/

translations.fr: Tu passes au garage après le travail.
translations.ipa: /ty pas o ɡaʁaʒ a.pʁɛ lə tʁa.vaj/
translations.en: You stop by the garage after work.
translations.es: Pasas por el taller después del trabajo.
translations.de: Du fährst nach der Arbeit zur Werkstatt.
translations.it: Passi in officina dopo il lavoro.
translations.zh-Hans: 你下班后顺路去修车厂。
translations.yue: 你放工之後順路去車房。
translations.ru: Ты заходишь в автосервис после работы.
translations.pt: Você passa na oficina depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Bạn ghé qua tiệm sửa xe sau giờ làm.
translations.nl: Je gaat na het werk langs de garage.
translations.uk: Ти заходиш до автосервісу після роботи.
translations.hi: तुम काम के बाद गैराज पर रुकते हो।
translations.el: Περνάς από το συνεργείο μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Du stikker innom verkstedet etter jobb.
translations.id: Kamu mampir ke bengkel setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Du svänger förbi verkstaden efter jobbet.
translations.ro: Treci pe la service auto după muncă.
translations.cs: Po práci se stavíš v autoservisu.
translations.da: Du kigger forbi værkstedet efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 仕事の後で修理工場に寄る。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; intransitive here with a locative complement.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the article 'le' (à + le); introduces the destination 'garage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'travail'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.

sentences.target: Ils rangent les cartons dans le garage.
sentences.reading: /il ʁɑ̃ʒ le kaʁ.tɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: Ils rangent les cartons dans le garage.
translations.ipa: /il ʁɑ̃ʒ le kaʁ.tɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/
translations.en: They put the boxes away in the garage.
translations.es: Guardan las cajas en el garaje.
translations.de: Sie räumen die Kartons in die Garage.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们把箱子收进车库里。
translations.yue: 佢哋將紙箱收埋喺車房入面。
translations.pt: Eles guardam as caixas na garagem.
translations.vi: Họ cất các thùng vào gara.
translations.nl: Ze zetten de dozen in de garage.
translations.hi: वे डिब्बों को गैराज में रख देते हैं।
translations.nb: De rydder eskene inn i garasjen.
translations.ja: 彼らは箱をガレージに片付ける。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masc./mixed); subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; transitive.
Definite article, plural; determines 'cartons'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'rangent'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'garage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On trouve une place devant le garage.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ tʁuv yn plas də.vɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/

translations.fr: On trouve une place devant le garage.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ tʁuv yn plas də.vɑ̃ lə ɡaʁaʒ/
translations.en: We find a spot in front of the garage.
translations.es: Encontramos un sitio delante del garaje.
translations.de: Wir finden einen Platz vor der Garage.
translations.it: Troviamo un posto davanti al garage.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在车库前找到一个车位。
translations.yue: 我哋喺車房前面揾到一個位。
translations.pt: Encontramos uma vaga em frente à garagem.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tìm được một chỗ trước cửa gara.
translations.nl: We vinden een plek voor de garage.
translations.hu: Találunk egy helyet a garázs előtt.
translations.hi: हम गैराज के सामने एक जगह ढूँढते हैं।
translations.el: Βρίσκουμε μια θέση μπροστά από το γκαράζ.
translations.nb: Vi finner en plass foran garasjen.
translations.id: Kami menemukan tempat di depan garasi.
translations.sv: Vi hittar en plats framför garaget.
translations.ro: Găsim un loc în fața garajului.
translations.da: Vi finder en plads foran garagen.
translations.ja: ガレージの前に駐車スペースを見つける。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun (commonly used for 'we'); 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determines 'place'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'trouve'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'garage'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'devant'.
